instruction: Remove the stray gray smudge from this flag.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="flag" data-source="heroicons/outline/flag.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M3 3v1.5M3 21v-6m0 0 2.77-.693a9 9 0 0 1 6.208.682l.108.054a9 9 0 0 0 6.086.71l3.114-.732a48.524 48.524 0 0 1-.005-10.499l-3.11.732a9 9 0 0 1-6.085-.711l-.108-.054a9 9 0 0 0-6.208-.682L3 4.5M3 15V4.5"/></g>
  <circle id="pole-tip" fill="#fde047" cx="28" cy="22" r="3" />
  <polyline id="windline" fill="none" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none" points="78,64 86,60 78,56 86,52" />
  <circle id="smudge" fill="#9ca3af" cx="96" cy="80" r="4" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">

  <circle id="pole-tip" fill="#fde047" cx="28" cy="22" r="3" />
